quotes: Nunito Sans Bold 16px

relations.note: Both govern the CTA button device within the same section; cardinality limit applies alongside the styling binding.

quotes: Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**
image/text split (≈40/60)
sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly
all multi-column layouts collapse to single column
12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60)

rules.intent: Guarantee that email sections assemble seamlessly across a fixed canvas and responsive breakpoint.
rules.rule_text: Email canvas is fixed at 600px wide and centered, with sections rendering edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt together cleanly. At the mobile breakpoint (480px) all multi-column layouts collapse to a single column. Internally, sections follow a 12-column mental model, producing practical layouts of 1-column, 2-column (50/50), or an image/text split of ~40/60 (ratio.grid.image_text_40_60 = 40/60).

quotes: Section side padding: 24px
Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px**
Heading → body gap: 16px.
Section side padding: 24px left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless).
Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.
All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Preserve a uniform spacing rhythm so independently produced sections can be assembled without visual seams.
rules.rule_text: All sections share a consistent 24px left/right side padding (section.padding.sides = 24px) — even under full-bleed imagery or gradient backgrounds, text insets still respect this 24px — which is what makes cross-section assembly seamless. Vertical rhythm follows an 8px base unit (spacing.base.8 = 8px): section top/bottom internal padding is 32px (section.padding.top_bottom = 32px) with no external margins between sections, producing zero-gap stacking; heading→body gap is 16px (spacing.gap.heading_body = 16px, also used paragraph→paragraph); body→callout/CTA gap is 24px (spacing.gap.body_callout = 24px); image→caption gap is 8px.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px
min touch target 48px height
corner radius 24px
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic)
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

rules.intent: Lock the contrast-checked, accessible CTA styling so buttons remain legible and tappable across surfaces.
rules.rule_text: Primary CTA buttons use a Brand Blue fill (cta.button.fill = #00529b) with white label text (cta.button.label.color = #ffffff) in Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px (cta.button.padding), a minimum 48px touch target height per the accessibility rule for clickable areas, and a fully rounded pill radius of 24px (cta.button.radius = 24px), echoing the rounded brand aesthetic. Secondary CTA buttons use a white background with a 2px Brand Blue border (border.secondary_cta.brand_blue_2px = 2px Brand Blue) and Brand Blue label text, at the same metrics.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Avoid competing calls to action within a single section.
rules.rule_text: Each section may contain at most one primary CTA button.
